title: Pope Leo Warns Artificial Intelligence Could Be "New Tower Of Babel"
description: In an encyclical released today, Pope Leo XIV warns against the concentration of AI in the hands of the few.
content: In his encyclical “Magnifica Humanitas” (Magnificent Humanity) released today, Pope Leo XIV warns that artificial intelligence “threatens to normalize an anti-human vision” and strongly cautions against the concentration of the new technology in the ... [2666 chars]

title: Pope says AI should be disarmed to avoid dominating humanity
description: Pope Leo XIV said artificial intelligence should be “disarmed” to protect humanity from its dangers, adding his voice to a heated debate over the extent to which governments should regulate a technology that is reshaping the world. title: With AI manifesto, Leo joins pantheon of popes who urged world to change
description: Pope Leo XIV has released a new document, "Magnifica Humanitas," calling for global leaders to regulate artificial intelligence. This marks the latest in a long tradition of papal calls for social justice. The Pope warns that AI could spread misinformation and lead to conflict. His message emphasizes the need for human-centered ethical considerations in technology's rapid advancement.
content:

title: As A.I. Fever Rises in Silicon Valley, Pope Leo Has a Few Words
description: The American pope wants to take artificial intelligence down a notch. Is he challenging the tech companies, or will tech take over the papacy?
content:
